pi_items.source: File verified at path specified; downloaded from https://wiki.wireshark.org/uploads/27707187aeb30df68e70c8fb9d614981/http.cap
Task description specifies save location as '~/Documents/captures/http_corrected.pcapng'
Task description: 'shift all timestamps forward by exactly 1 hour (3600 seconds)'
Not explicitly stated in task description; reasonable tolerance for timestamp operations
tshark analysis of http.cap: 43 packets confirmed
File analysis: pcap capture file, microsecond ts (little-endian) - version 2.4 (Ethernet, capture length 65535)

privileged_info_summary: The http.cap input file is a real, official Wireshark sample capture (not synthetic) downloaded from https://wiki.wireshark.org/. It contains 43 packets of TCP, HTTP, DNS, and HTTP/XML traffic captured on 2004-05-13 at 18:03:47 UTC. The file is in libpcap 2.4 format with microsecond-precision timestamps. The task requires shifting all packet timestamps forward by exactly 3600 seconds (1 hour), with a tolerance of 1.0 second. The output should be saved as http_corrected.pcapng in the same directory.
